title: Anti-Cellulite Treatment in Malta: What VelaShape III Actually Does
excerpt: Cellulite is one of the most common concerns we hear about and one of the most misunderstood. body_text: Cellulite is one of the most common concerns we hear about and one of the most misunderstood. It affects over 80 per cent of women at some point in their lives, regardless of weight, fitness level, or how well they eat. If you have it, you are not doing something wrong. You are just human. The real question is not why you have it, but what can actually be done about it — because not all treatments are created equal, and most of what is marketed as a cellulite cure falls well short of that promise. VelaShape III is different. Here is an honest look at what it does, what it does not do, and whether it is right for you. [Image: Anti Cellulite Treatment with Velashape III] What Is Cellulite and Why Is It So Stubborn? Cellulite forms when fat cells beneath the skin push upward through a network of fibrous connective tissue called septae. In women, these septae run vertically, which makes it easier for fat to bulge upward and create the dimpled, uneven texture associated with cellulite. Hormones, genetics, circulation, and the structure of your connective tissue all play a role — which is why no amount of exercise or clean eating guarantees a cellulite-free result. The dimpling is not purely a fat problem. It is a structural problem. And that is why treatments that only target fat rarely improve cellulite significantly on their own. How VelaShape III Works VelaShape III is an FDA-cleared body contouring device that addresses cellulite through four mechanisms working simultaneously. Infrared light heats the skin and underlying fat layer, increasing circulation and stimulating collagen production Bi-polar radiofrequency delivers controlled thermal energy deeper into the tissue, further triggering collagen remodelling Vacuum suction lifts and mobilises the skin, improving lymphatic drainage and breaking down the fibrous bands that cause dimpling Mechanical massage rollers manipulate the tissue, smoothing the surface and improving circulation The combination is what makes VelaShape III effective where single-technology treatments are not. It targets the fat, the connective tissue, and the skin surface at the same time — addressing the actual structure of cellulite rather than just one component of it. What to Expect From Your Sessions Treatment feels like a warm, deep tissue massage — most patients find it comfortable and relaxing Sessions last 20 to 40 minutes depending on the area being treated No downtime — you can return to your normal day immediately Mild redness and warmth in the treated area for a few hours is normal Most patients notice initial improvements after 3 to 4 sessions A course of 6 to 8 sessions is typically recommended for optimal results Maintenance sessions every few months help sustain results long-term Most effective on thighs, buttocks, abdomen, and flanks Results are progressive and cumulative. This is not a one-session fix, and we will not pretend otherwise. But patients who complete a full course consistently report smoother texture, improved firmness, and a meaningful reduction in the appearance of cellulite. Who It Is Best For VelaShape III works best for women with mild to moderate cellulite who want a non-invasive, medically supervised approach. It is particularly effective for: Post-pregnancy skin with dimpling and laxity around the abdomen and thighs Women 35 and over whose skin texture has changed with hormonal shifts Anyone who has lost weight and noticed cellulite becoming more visible as the skin settles Women who want to complement other treatments like CoolSculpting or EMSculpt NEO with surface smoothing If your cellulite is severe or deeply textured, we will tell you that honestly at your consultation and discuss what combination approach makes the most sense for your specific situation. "I had tried every cream and brush on the market. Nothing touched it. After six sessions of VelaShape at Carisma I noticed my thighs looked genuinely smoother — not perfect, but a real difference I could see and feel. I stopped hiding in sarongs at the beach for the first time in years." — Daniela from Marsaskala Part of a Bigger Picture At Carisma Slimming, VelaShape III is available as a standalone treatment or as part of our Skin Tightening Starter Pack — currently €199 (reduced from €625) — which includes four VelaShape sessions, four Carisma Spa and fitness access passes, a full Tanita body composition analysis, and a €25 Carisma Aesthetics credit. Every treatment plan is reviewed by our doctor before you begin. This is not a book-online-and-show-up service. It is a clinically supervised programme, which means what we recommend is what is actually right for your body — not just the most popular option. Book Your Consultation If you have been living with cellulite that affects your confidence — at the beach, in the changing room, or just getting dressed in the morning — you do not have to just accept it. VelaShape III offers a clinically proven, non-invasive pathway to smoother, firmer skin. Suitability is confirmed at your consultation. Spaces are limited each week.
